## Meeting Purpose

[Screen Daniel Gimbernat for a Virtual Assistant role at GrowthX, focusing on growth and marketing support.](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Daniel has experience in operations, CRM management, and basic automation tools (Zapier, Make)](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Jason needs help with administrative tasks, relationship building, and creating scalable systems for marketing outreach](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [The role could evolve into either a go-to-market engineering position or client success management](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [Daniel's background in business administration and data analysis aligns well with the position's requirements](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Role Requirements

  - [GrowthX: Growth agency for fast-growing SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Services: Content marketing with AI and expert blend](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Key needs:](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Administrative support](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Relationship building with marketing leaders](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Creating systems to scale outreach (e.g., messaging 50 CMOs for events)](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Building workflows and spreadsheets for process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Ideal candidate: Organized, understands communication tone, facilitates more efficient work](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### Daniel's Background and Experience

  - [Recent graduate in Business Administration from a Canadian university](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Previous roles:](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [Community Liaison: Outreach for student projects, database management](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [Operations Assistant: Implemented CRM tools (HubSpot, Monday, Asana)](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [Business Analyst: Automated tasks using Zapier, Copplower.ao, Make](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Skills: CRM management, basic automation, data analysis (Excel, Power BI)](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Limited marketing tool experience beyond Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

### Potential Tasks and Approaches

  - [Finding relevant marketing leaders:](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
      - [Preferred tool: LinkedIn Sales Navigator](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Alternative: Manual LinkedIn search with filters](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
      - [Export to CRM (HubSpot, Monday) and use Zapier for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Filtering prospects:](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [Focus on SaaS, B2B, and tech companies (FinTech, e-commerce)](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Target companies in Series B funding or later, with established products](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Analyze LinkedIn posts for relevant interests (e.g., AI, automation)](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Organizing tasks and communications:](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
      - [Suggested tools: CRM, Notion, or Excel](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [Implement Zapier for automatic reminders and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

### Communication Strategies

  - [New connections: Professional, neutral language; avoid pressure](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Event invitations: Emphasize relaxed atmosphere, shared experiences](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Post-event follow-up: Express gratitude, reference specific conversation points, maintain relationship](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)

### Potential Role Evolution

1.  Go-to-market engineering:
      - [Create systems for personalized, scalable touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
      - [Develop automated follow-up and nurturing processes](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
2.  Client success management:
      - [Streamline weekly client communications](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
      - [Automate stakeholder check-ins and feedback collection](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to send link to his AI/LLM workshop or writing sample](https://fathom.video/share/jVVed93kypyywa1jtEjzH-sM3GvHgxzb?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
